context: Tests whether the agent correctly sets up Vaadin Browserless server-side testing for a Spring Boot project: adding the right Maven dependency, creating the UseCase annotation with its canonical shape, naming the test class after the use case, extending the correct base class, annotating test methods properly, and using the Browserless component API correctly (not Karibu or Mockito patterns).

checklist.name: Correct groupId
checklist.description: pom.xml contains a dependency with groupId com.vaadin

checklist.name: Correct artifactId
checklist.description: pom.xml contains a dependency with artifactId browserless-test-junit6

checklist.name: UseCase annotation exists
checklist.description: A file defining @interface UseCase is present somewhere in src/main/java

checklist.name: UseCase @Target METHOD
checklist.description: The UseCase annotation is annotated with @Target(ElementType.METHOD)

checklist.name: UseCase @Retention RUNTIME
checklist.description: The UseCase annotation is annotated with @Retention(RetentionPolicy.RUNTIME)

checklist.name: UseCase @Documented
checklist.description: The UseCase annotation is annotated with @Documented

checklist.name: UseCase id attribute
checklist.description: The UseCase annotation declares a String id() attribute with no default

checklist.name: UseCase scenario attribute
checklist.description: The UseCase annotation declares a String scenario() attribute with default "Main Success Scenario"

checklist.name: UseCase businessRules attribute
checklist.description: The UseCase annotation declares a String[] businessRules() attribute with default {}

checklist.name: Test class name
checklist.description: The test class is named UC040BorrowBookTest (matching the UC<id><PascalCase>Test pattern for UC-040)

checklist.name: @SpringBootTest on class
checklist.description: The test class is annotated with @SpringBootTest

checklist.name: @UseCase on each test method
checklist.description: Every @Test method in the test class is also annotated with @UseCase(id = "UC-040", ...)

checklist.name: Uses $view() or $() for component lookup
checklist.description: Test methods use the Browserless $view() or $() API to locate components — NOT Karibu _get/_find/_click/LocatorJ

checklist.name: No Mockito usage
checklist.description: The test class does NOT import or use Mockito (no @Mock, @MockBean, Mockito.when, etc.)

checklist.name: No @Transactional in test
checklist.description: The test class and its methods do NOT use @Transactional

checklist.name: Test data via Flyway
checklist.description: Any test data is seeded via a SQL file under src/test/resources/db/migration — NOT via service/repository calls inside the test methods

checklist.name: AssertJ assertions
checklist.description: The test class uses AssertJ (assertThat(...)) for assertions — not JUnit 4 assertEquals or Hamcrest matchers
